lesson.title: Mashinda ka bantu lelo jino mo babena kwingijisha bizhima?
topics: Ñanyi buwame buji mu kwingijisha bizhima bulongo?

n Bafunda bafwainwa kuyuka kuuba amba Kafulumende wabika mabumba atala pa kukanya
